steps.title: Mark the unexpected ring
steps.content: The first sentence says debris outside the Roche limit would likely form a satellite. Costa's team found a dense ring outside that limit that remained intact, which is unexpected.

steps.title: Use the concession transition
steps.content: The needed transition signals contrast between the expected accretion and the surprising intact ring. Choice A signals similarity, Choice B signals an expected fit, and Choice C signals an example that supports the rule; all misrepresent the relationship. The answer is D.
